name: minds
description: Query AI personas of real people — founders, customers, domain experts — from inside Codex. Backed by getminds.ai. Useful for spec review, persona-driven product decisions, UX research, and red-team panels.

MINDS_API_KEY.description: Personal Minds API key. Create one at https://getminds.ai/?settings=api-keys&type=personal — must start with `minds_`.
